"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:15 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem859_verify_after_bem858.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='dispatch_results_present':
    status='next_parse_dispatch_results'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and continue to Claude runtime proof'
elif ps=='marker_present_no_results_after_patch':
    status='next_force_direct_result_artifact'
    next_action='force direct workflow_dispatch_results artifact from queue processor path and patch commit persistence'
elif ps=='processor_still_not_running':
    status='next_inspect_codex_runner_execution_path'
    next_action='inspect actual codex-runner YAML path because processor step is not reached'
else:
    status='next_diagnose_unknown_bem859'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-859 status'
state={'bem':'BEM-860','status':status,'bem859_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem860_route_after_bem859_checkpoint_guard.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem860_route_after_bem859_checkpoint_guard.md').write_text('# BEM-860 | Route After BEM-859 Checkpoint Guard | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem860_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Checkpoint report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-860'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem860_route_after_bem859_checkpoint_guard.json','governance/reports/bem860_route_after_bem859_checkpoint_guard.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem860_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Created next active route after BEM-859 before checkpoint report, satisfying checkpoint guard')
